title: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications 2025 + Agentic Top 10 (late 2025)
publisher: OWASP GenAI Security Project (via TrojAI analysis)
excerpt: Prompt injection holds the top spot for the second edition; Supply Chain Vulnerabilities rose to #3. In late 2025 OWASP released a separate Top 10 for Agentic AI covering uncontrolled autonomy, delegated identity abuse, cross-agent prompt injection.
